title: Specifying power infrastructure requirements for GPU cluster expansion
query_text: We plan to add 2 more GPU racks to row C (each 18 kW IT load). Is the current power and cooling infrastructure sufficient, and what upgrades are required?

eval_criteria.gold_answer: Row C is currently at 100.5% cooling capacity with CRAC-07 degraded. Adding 2 x 18 kW racks would increase row C load to 114.4 kW against 78 kW effective cooling — a 46 kW deficit. Required before expansion: (1) repair/replace CRAC-07 to restore 30 kW; (2) add at least one additional 30 kW CRAC unit in row C extension; (3) verify UPS and PDU circuits for 36 kW additional load. Facility power headroom (180 kW available) is sufficient; cooling is the binding constraint.
